prediction_return_shape.PredictedSalePrice: numeric prediction in the selected DatasetSource price unit
prediction_return_shape.PriceUnit: USD, lakh_INR, or dataset_original_unit depending on source

special_cases_checked.missing_numeric_values: handled by median imputation in preprocessing
special_cases_checked.missing_categorical_values: handled by most-frequent imputation in preprocessing
special_cases_checked.mixed_price_units: DatasetSource and PriceUnit are explicit features/metadata; do not compare raw prices across markets without conversion
special_cases_checked.invalid_labels: removed when SalePrice is missing, nonnumeric, or <= 0
special_cases_checked.impossible_area_or_rooms: removed when living area <= 0 or bedrooms < 0
